title: Repair Plan Schema v1
description: Schema for the first structured repair plan generated after Atlas routing.

selected_repair_family.description: Repair family selected by the planner.

planner_confidence.description: Planner confidence in the selected repair family and action set.

plan_scope.description: Allowed intervention scope for the current repair plan.

candidate_actions.description: One to three candidate repair actions.

action_ordering.description: Ordered short instructions for how candidate actions should be tried.

primary_validation_target.description: The first thing that should be checked after the first action is tried.

misrepair_risk.description: The most likely wrong repair direction or failure mode.

recommended_next_step.description: The next operational step after the plan is produced.

secondary_repair_pressure.description: Optional note about neighboring family pressure affecting the repair plan.

why_not_other_repair_family.description: Optional explanation for why a neighboring repair family is not chosen first.

escalation_reason.description: Optional reason for escalation when the plan is not safe or sufficient.

action_id.description: Stable identifier for the repair action.

target_family.description: Optional family target for the action if explicitly provided.

target_region.description: Optional node, branch, or region target.

intended_effect.description: Optional intended effect of the action.

validation_needed.description: Optional validation requirement for this action.

rollback_hint.description: Optional rollback hint if this action causes damage.

preconditions.description: Optional preconditions required before trying the action.

escalation_if_failed.description: Optional escalation path if this action fails.
